# imageData

**Instance Property**

The raw image data of the artwork in the format that [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibArtwork/imageDataFormat] specifies.

## Declaration

```swift
var imageData: Data? { get }
```

## Getting Artwork Info

- **image**: The artwork image.
- **imageDataFormat**: The format of the artwork image data that [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibArtwork/imageData] returns.
